meta_description: Discover the story behind Delfee, handcrafted 925 sterling silver jewellery, made by Indian artisans and designed to be treasured for generations.

hero.title: Authenticity & Hallmarking
hero.description: When you buy from us, you buy genuine silver, certified, hallmarked and made to be trusted. Here's our promise on purity.

intro.body: Pure silver is too soft for everyday jewellery, so it's combined with a small amount of other metals for durability. Sterling silver is 92.5% pure silver, which is why it carries the "925" stamp. It's the trusted global standard for fine silver jewellery you can wear every day.
intro.heading: What does "925" mean?

items.text: The official triangular BIS logo, the foundation of a genuine hallmark.
items.title: BIS Standard Mark

items.text: The fineness stamp, such as "925", confirming 92.5% silver purity.
items.title: Purity Grade

items.text: Identifies the BIS-recognised centre that tested and certified the piece.
items.title: Assaying Centre Mark

items.text: A unique mark linking the piece back to its responsible jeweller.
items.title: Jeweller's Identification

marks.heading: What to look for
marks.description: A genuine BIS hallmark on silver carries a set of tiny stamps. Together, they confirm your jewellery is the real thing.

items.text: Our jewellery is 92.5% pure silver alloyed for strength, the international standard for fine silver.
items.title: 925 Sterling Silver

items.text: Pieces are hallmarked by the Bureau of Indian Standards, independently certifying their purity.
items.title: BIS Hallmarked

items.text: Eligible orders include documentation confirming the metal and craftsmanship of your piece.
items.title: Certificate of Authenticity

items.text: We work with trusted suppliers and ethical practices from raw metal to finished jewellery.
items.title: Responsibly Sourced

promise.body: If any piece you receive from Delfee does not meet the purity we promise, we will make it right, with a replacement or a full refund. Genuine silver, every single time.
promise.heading: Our promise to you

meta_description: Every Delfee piece is genuine 925 sterling silver and BIS hallmarked. Learn what that means and how we guarantee purity.
